nodes.title: U.S. Department of Environmental Stewardship
nodes.heroSubtitle: Science-Based Solutions for a Sustainable Future

heroDescription.processed: The U.S. Department of Environmental Stewardship safeguards human health and the environment through research, regulation, and partnerships with state, tribal, and local governments.
heroDescription.summary: The U.S. Department of Environmental Stewardship safeguards human health and the environment through research, regulation, and partnerships with state, tribal, and local governments.

ctaDescription.processed: If you observe environmental violations or hazards, report them through our secure online portal. Your report helps us protect communities and natural resources.
